name: super-helper
description: A chat-first helper agent that mediates between users, workspaces, MCP tools, and Claude Code workers.

scripts.knowledge:init: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node dist/cli.js knowledge init
scripts.knowledge:update: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node dist/cli.js knowledge update
scripts.knowledge:extract: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node dist/cli.js knowledge extract
scripts.knowledge:normalize: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node dist/cli.js knowledge normalize
scripts.knowledge:slice: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node dist/cli.js knowledge slice
scripts.knowledge:audit: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node dist/cli.js knowledge audit
scripts.knowledge:repair: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node dist/cli.js knowledge repair --plan
scripts.knowledge:review: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node dist/cli.js knowledge review
scripts.knowledge:publish: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node dist/cli.js knowledge publish
scripts.knowledge:eval: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node dist/cli.js knowledge eval
scripts.accept:knowledge: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node dist/cli.js accept knowledge
scripts.test: node scripts/verify-docs.mjs && tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node --test test/*.test.mjs
